case_title: FRANCISCO ICALA VS. JESUS SALVADOR SANCHEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY ICALA, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, JESUS SALVADOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ICALA, FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, JESUS SALVADOR $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ELLEN ROSENTHAL. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
